name: onsemi
tagline: Intelligent Technology. Better Future. Powering Sustainable Innovation
description: onsemi is a leading semiconductor manufacturer specializing in intelligent power and sensing technologies. Formerly known as ON Semiconductor, the company provides comprehensive solutions for automotive, industrial, and renewable energy applications.
seoDescription: onsemi core distributor in China. Authorized supplier of IGBT modules, MOSFETs, SiC devices, intelligent power modules, and sensing solutions. Competitive pricing, in-stock supply, technical support for automotive electrification, industrial automation, and renewable energy applications.
longDescription:
As a core distributor of onsemi products, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive access to onsemi's extensive portfolio of intelligent power and sensing solutions. onsemi's technology leadership spans power semiconductors, advanced sensors, and connectivity solutions that enable sustainable innovation across multiple industries.

onsemi's product portfolio includes industry-leading IGBT modules, MOSFETs, SiC (Silicon Carbide) devices, intelligent power modules (IPMs), and advanced sensing solutions. These components power applications across automotive electrification, renewable energy systems, industrial automation, data centers, and IoT devices.

Key technology platforms include the FGY75T120SWD and FGY100T120SWD IGBT modules for industrial motor drives, NTHL series MOSFETs for efficient power conversion, and comprehensive intelligent sensing solutions for automotive and industrial applications. onsemi's commitment to sustainability drives their focus on energy-efficient technologies that reduce global energy consumption.

faqs.question: What makes onsemi different from other semiconductor manufacturers?
faqs.answer: onsemi stands out as a leader in intelligent power and sensing technologies with a strong focus on sustainability. Formerly ON Semiconductor, the company has pioneered breakthrough technologies including advanced IGBT modules, SiC MOSFETs, and intelligent power modules. Their comprehensive portfolio spans power semiconductors, advanced sensors, and connectivity solutions. onsemi's commitment to sustainability drives their mission to reduce global energy consumption through energy-efficient technologies. With $8.2 billion in revenue and over 33,000 employees, onsemi serves customers worldwide with ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IATF 16949, and ISO 26262 certified products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore onsemi's core product categories to find solutions for your automotive, industrial, or renewable energy applications.

faqs.question: Why should I choose BeiLuo as my onsemi distributor?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics offers distinct advantages as your onsemi distributor: (1) Genuine Products Guaranteed - 100% authentic components with original packaging and traceable documentation; (2) In-Stock Supply - Extensive inventory of popular onsemi part numbers with same-day dispatch available; (3) Competitive Pricing - Volume-based pricing tiers and price matching for qualified opportunities; (4) Technical Support - Dedicated FAE team with deep onsemi product expertise for design-in support; (5) Fast Shipping - Global shipping network with offices in Hong Kong, Shenzhen, Shanghai, and Beijing; (6) Long-term Partnership - Over 20 years of semiconductor distribution experience ensuring supply continuity.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team today for a quote on your onsemi component requirements and experience our professional service.

faqs.question: What industries does onsemi primarily serve?
faqs.answer: onsemi serves four primary industries with specialized semiconductor solutions: (1) Automotive - Electric vehicle powertrains, ADAS systems, battery management, and vehicle electrification with intelligent power modules and sensors; (2) Industrial - Motor drives, power supplies, factory automation, and industrial IoT with IGBT modules and power MOSFETs; (3) Renewable Energy - Solar inverters, wind power converters, and energy storage systems with high-efficiency power modules; (4) IoT & Consumer - Smart home devices, wearables, and mobile accessories with advanced sensing solutions. Each industry benefits from onsemi's functional safety certifications and robust product portfolios.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit our solutions page to explore onsemi applications specific to your industry and project requirements.

faqs.question: How does onsemi ensure product quality and reliability?
faqs.answer: onsemi maintains the highest quality standards through comprehensive quality management systems and rigorous testing protocols. All manufacturing facilities are ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certified, with automotive products meeting IATF 16949 requirements. Functional safety is ensured through ISO 26262 certification for automotive electronic systems. onsemi's products undergo extensive reliability testing including high-temperature operating life (HTOL), temperature cycling, humidity testing, and electrical stress testing. Their zero-defect strategy encompasses advanced statistical process control, automated optical inspection, and full traceability from wafer to finished product.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request quality certifications and reliability reports for specific onsemi products by contacting our technical support team.

faqs.question: What is onsemi's market position in the semiconductor industry?
faqs.answer: onsemi is one of the world's leading semiconductor manufacturers with $8.2 billion in revenue (FY2023) and over 33,000 employees globally. The company holds strong market positions in power semiconductors, automotive semiconductors, and intelligent sensing solutions. Their technology leadership spans IGBT modules, MOSFETs, SiC devices, and advanced sensors. With headquarters in Scottsdale, Arizona, and manufacturing facilities worldwide, onsemi serves customers in over 100 countries. Their commitment to innovation is reflected in significant R&D investments driving next-generation sustainable technologies.
faqs.decisionGuide: Learn more about onsemi's product portfolio and how their market-leading solutions can benefit your designs.

faqs.question: Does onsemi offer SiC and wide bandgap solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, onsemi is a leading provider of Silicon Carbide (SiC) and wide bandgap semiconductor solutions. Their SiC MOSFETs and diodes offer superior performance compared to traditional silicon devices, including higher switching speeds, lower switching losses, and improved thermal performance. onsemi's SiC portfolio includes discrete devices and modules suitable for high-power applications such as EV charging, solar inverters, and industrial motor drives. These wide bandgap solutions enable higher efficiency, smaller system size, and reduced cooling requirements compared to conventional silicon power devices.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss how onsemi's SiC solutions can improve the efficiency and performance of your power conversion designs.
